content: We can frame the vocabulary learning definition of reflexion in high school English education as a lightweight human-oriented precursor to the LLM-focused Self-Refine framework, where structured, repeated reflective practice on student writing builds the same iterative improvement capability that modern autonomous AI agents rely on. Just as human learners refine their grammar and argumentation through deliberate reflection, AI agents can borrow the structured reflection scaffolding designed for language education to make their self-improvement loops more robust.
